title: EBC Brakes D1599 Replacement Cast Iron Disc Rotors Pair Compatible with JAGUAR, DAIMLER XF I (X250), S-TYPE II (X200), XJ (X350, X358), XK II Convertible (X150), XJ (X351), XK II Coupe (X150), XF
features:
Suitable for the following vehicles:
For Fiat 500L (12) – 3.0 D (155KW/211PS) (2051 ABR) brake discs at the front; 3.0 D (155KW/211PS) (2051 ABR) front brake discs | 3.0 D (kw/241PS) (2051 ABQ, 1590 abt) front brake discs | 3.0 D (kw/241PS) (2051 ABQ, 1590 abt) front brake discs | 3.0 D (202/275PS) (2051 ABP, 1590 ABS) front brake discs | 3.0 D (202/275PS) (2051 ABP, 1590 ABS) front brake discs

4.2 compressor (306KW/416PS) (2051, then) brake discs at the front; 4.2 compressor (306KW/416PS) (2051, then) brake discs at the front; 5.0 283KW/385PS) (2051 Dimensions) brake discs at the front; 5.0 (283KW/385PS) (2051 Dimensions) front brake discs
description: The EBC Brakes D1599 Replacement Cast Iron Disc Rotors are precision-engineered to restore original braking performance. Sold as a pair, they are manufactured to OE standards for reliable fit, strength, and heat dissipation. An excellent choice for daily driving and general use. Compatible with JAGUAR, DAIMLER XF I (X250), S-TYPE II (X200), XJ (X350, X358), XK II Convertible (X150), XJ (X351), XK II Coupe (X150), XF SPORTBRAKE (X250), F-TYPE Convertible (X152), F-TYPE Coupe (X152), SUPER EIGHT (X350).
